properties.injury_desc: UNDECRIBED INJURY TO FACE. BLOOD ON FACE. LOT OF CLOTTING.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy algal coverage. Few barnacles present on carapace.
Moderate amount of leech eggs on plastron and underside of flippers. Moderate coverage of barnacles on carapace and flippers
properties.abnormalities_desc: Lifted scutes at front of carapace
properties.injury_desc: Abrasions on plastron and potential injury to nostril
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Reported by MoP. TITR volunteers attended and assessed.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy coverage of barnacles, marine worms ,algae across carapace and body
properties.abnormalities_desc: Bony protrusion from plastron, severe emaciation, very lethargic with evidence of loss of fat pads and dehydration, sunken eyes
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Bought into SLSC , for examination and treatment , was called through as a deceased turtle , but was found alive very emaciated and lethargic

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy algal coverage, low coverage of small barnacles

properties.abnormalities_desc: Unknown lumps growing underneath skin on shoulder/flippers.
Wearing on neck from entanglement with fishing line.

properties.injury_desc: Fishing hook wounds to front right flipper and neck.
properties.cause_of_stranding: Hooked/entangled in fishing line or ingested fishing line

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Low coverage of small barnacles on carapace
Barnacles on carapace and plastron. Papilloma on front left shoulder area.
properties.abnormalities_desc: FP located on front left shoulder area.

properties.injury_desc: Large crack and hole in Carapace, partly healed.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Tide out turtle stranded between rock outcrop

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Barnacles and algae in Plastron and Carapace

properties.cause_of_stranding: Hooked/entangled in fishing line or ingested fishing line

properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Dry docked overnight and transported following day

properties.abnormalities_desc: Back portion of carapace missing scutes

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Low barnacle coverage on carapace. Moderate algal coverage on head and soft tissue.

properties.injury_desc: Missing part of left front flipper

properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Sent to Baffle Creek rehab centre

properties.injury_desc: Boat strike across carapace. strike 1 = 18cm, strike 2 = 16.5cm, strike 3 = 22cm.  Distance between 1 & 2 = 9cm, distance between 2 & 3 = 10cm.  Possible 4th prop strike but unable to tell due to decomposition.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: HEAVILY BIOFOULED WITH ALGAE TWO LARE MASSES OF CLUSTERED.
